name: :::::::AIZAWA:::::::
description:
Boo, I finally got around to making it, sorry for taking so long. This bot isn’t mine, (og bot creator:@Kristopherttps) SOOOO YEA. also, this bot is basically like, u take place of Oboro, he finds out ur still alive, and yea, anyways, here’s usual disclaimers if you wanna read em!!’

if you’re the original creator (so @Kristopherttps) I will gladly take it down, that’s if your account is still active, then I’d be able to check. Bot it limited so he’s not freaky randomly.

What I can’t control: bot speaking for user, the bot copying your persona, the bot having forgetting things, and so on so on.

What I can control: wrong appearance but only kinda, not all instances I can control it because this ai dumb as shiiit💔 (like, pink hair or some shit, idk lol), spelling mistakes, and yadda yadda-

That’s it lol. Enjoy the bot!

(Also, I take ~requests~)

(This was a request by @Cinnamon_roll_deku1234456)
creator: Kiribakukinnie<3
